Streamlining company hiring needs, CI Pr: Streamlining company hiring needs, CI Professional connects qualified professionals with their dream careers — bridging the gap between outstanding talent and the best opportunities in Ireland.
A Mapped Need is Turned Into an Opportun: A Mapped Need is Turned Into an Opportunity
CI Professional is a product developed b: CI Professional is a product developed based on a requirement: matching specific professionals with available job positions in the market. We aim to be the bridge between outstanding professionals and job opportunities, streamlining the intermediary process for both parties.
We have received your needs and job desc: We have received your needs and job description, and we will find the perfect match for them. We have a vast database of resumes from professionals based in Ireland and overseas.
We have a vast database of resumes from: We have a vast database of resumes from professionals based in Ireland and overseas, connecting individuals with roles that align with their skills and career goals.
We place qualified professionals across: We place qualified professionals across 15 key sectors, ensuring the right match for every role.
Our company finds candidates for permane: Our company finds candidates for permanent positions. We handle the entire recruitment process, from job posting to conducting interviews and final candidate selection.
We provide candidate assessment services: We provide candidate assessment services through behaviour validated tests to ensure the most accurate hiring of professionals in line with our clients' demands.
Assisting individuals in finding employm: Assisting individuals in finding employment opportunities in a foreign country, matching skills and qualifications of candidates with job openings where they may be needed.
Our company can assist you in selecting: Our company can assist you in selecting and managing internship programmes, connecting your organisation with talented emerging professionals.
We offer the service of applying for wor: We offer the service of applying for work permits for companies seeking to hire non-European professionals. This includes Critical Skills or General Employment Permit.
For professionals seeking guidance in th: For professionals seeking guidance in the field that best suits their skills. We offer CV development, interview preparation, and guidance on optimising your LinkedIn profile.
We offer the service of applying for wor: We offer the service of applying for work permits for professionals. This includes Critical Skills or General Employment Permit to support your career journey in Ireland.
We can create exclusive packages that en: We can create exclusive packages that encompass learning and work programmes for sectors in need of specific professionals with labour shortages.
CI possesses a distinctive advantage in: CI possesses a distinctive advantage in facilitating the seamless connection between professionals entering, or currently residing in, Ireland and prospective employers that align with their specific skill sets and aspirations.
Over 14,000 students enrolled in univers: Over 14,000 students enrolled in universities, colleges, and English schools in Ireland — and over half a million worldwide, giving us unparalleled access to motivated, qualified talent.
Success-based fees ensure our interests: Success-based fees ensure our interests are always aligned with yours — we only charge when you successfully hire through our services.
In our database, we hold a substantial n: In our database, we hold a substantial number of professionals with European passports, ready to start working immediately with no permit requirements.
A significant volume of professionals in: A significant volume of professionals in our network possess part-time work permissions, providing flexible hiring options for your business.
Should your company be interested, our i: Should your company be interested, our immigration lawyer can handle the entire visa application process, including Critical Skills or General Employment Permits.
Our payment plans are designed to offer: Our payment plans are designed to offer flexibility and value for our partner companies. Our aim is to align our interests with yours, ensuring excellent value while finding the perfect candidates for your needs.
We only charge a fee when the company su: We only charge a fee when the company successfully hires a candidate through our services. This fee is based on a percentage of the candidate's agreed-upon salary and is lower compared to market rates.
For some areas, such as the hospitality: For some areas, such as the hospitality sector, a fixed fee will be charged. This provides cost certainty and simplicity for high-volume hiring needs in specific industries.
